title: LedgerHold v1
description: Machine-readable schema for one supervised escrow hold on the host-ledger settlement rail.

hold/id.description: Stable identifier of the escrow hold.

contract/id.description: Procurement contract whose settlement path is anchored by this hold.

question/id.description: Optional question lifecycle identifier for audit joins.

payer/account-id.description: Ledger account from which value is reserved.

payee/account-id.description: Ledger account eligible to receive release transfers from this hold.

escrow/node-id.description: Supervisory node responsible for maintaining the hold state machine.

escrow-policy/ref.description: Escrow policy governing dispute, confirmation, and release behavior for this hold.

amount.description: Reserved amount in internal minor units.

unit.description: Internal settlement unit carried by the hold in MVP.

created-at.description: Timestamp when the hold was created.

work-by.description: Deadline by which the responder is expected to deliver the work.

accept-by.description: Deadline by which the payer should acknowledge the delivered work.

dispute-by.description: Last moment for opening a valid dispute under the contract policy.

auto-release-after.description: Moment when the hold may be released automatically if prior conditions are satisfied and no dispute is open.

resolved-at.description: Timestamp when the hold reached a terminal or review-complete state.

released/amount.description: Amount already released from the hold.

refunded/amount.description: Amount already refunded from the hold.

dispute/case-ref.description: Formal dispute or arbiter case opened against the hold, if any.
